Found this bar/diner after a day in the city, and we saw this place as we were about to head up Broadway.
There is lots of outside seating and a real nice buzz and lovely upbeat ambience.
After trying for around 20mins to order at the table via their on table app, we were inrormed  that the app only authorised US  credit/debit cards.
So off to the bar to order in the old fashioned way.
There were 3 bar staff members who were clearly in need of at least 3 more colleagues. The service was so slow!
Around 40 minutes after arriving we received our food, which to be honest was hot and very enjoyable but unfortunately no drinks 😢. 
Chased the drinks up with two outdoor staff but still no joy, so I had to return to the bar again.
Finally, the drinks arrived with only a hint of an insincere apology. 
It was such a shame that the service was so poor as the location and buzz suggested such a better experience.

Outdoor dining and drinking in Union Square.  Seating is a long shared tables.  You get your drinks at the central bar and bring them to your table.  You pay for drinks separately from food.  Drinks come in plastic cups.  You order and pay for food from a QR code on the table and someone brings it to you.  We had Tenement Pilsner ($8).  We had two good salads - Caesar Salad for $17 and a Kale Salad with Chicken ($24).  Menu is limited - burgers, pizza, salads and bar snacks.
